item.name: Match Events

request.description:
Create a new match event. Business rules:
- total_players must be at least 4 and multiple of 4
- total_players must match courts: 2 courts = 8 players, 3 courts = 12 players
- If total_courts > 2, only admin account_type can create
- Returns all match event data including ID

response.name: Success - 2 Courts (Player)
response.body:
{
    "success": true,
    "message": "Match event created successfully",
    "data": {
        "id": "ef345678-9012-4567-8901-345678901234",
        "user_id": "ab123456-7890-4567-8901-123456789012",
        "user": {
            "id": "ab123456-7890-4567-8901-123456789012",
            "account_type_id": "player",
            "username": "hauzan",
            "full_name": "Hauzan Tsaaqif",
            "email": "hauzan@gmail.com",
            "created_at": "2026-03-02T10:30:00Z"
        },
        "name": "Mexicano Tournament 2026",
        "total_courts": 2,
        "game_type": "mexicano",
        "location": "Jakarta Sports Center",
        "play_date": "2026-03-15T00:00:00Z",
        "total_players": 8,
        "team_type": "man double",
        "created_at": "2026-03-02T12:00:00Z",
        "updated_at": "2026-03-02T12:00:00Z"
    }
}

response.name: Success - 3 Courts (Admin Only)
response.body:
{
    "success": true,
    "message": "Match event created successfully",
    "data": {
        "id": "ff456789-0123-4567-8901-456789012345",
        "user_id": "admin-user-id",
        "user": {
            "id": "admin-user-id",
            "account_type_id": "admin",
            "username": "admin",
            "full_name": "System Admin",
            "email": "admin@example.com",
            "created_at": "2026-03-01T08:00:00Z"
        },
        "name": "Big Tournament 2026",
        "total_courts": 3,

        "location": "Main Stadium",
        "play_date": "2026-03-20T00:00:00Z",
        "total_players": 12,
        "team_type": "woman double",
        "created_at": "2026-03-02T12:30:00Z",
        "updated_at": "2026-03-02T12:30:00Z"
    }
}

response.name: Error - Not Admin (>2 Courts)
Error - Invalid Players Count
Error - Players Not Match Courts

item.description:
CRUD operations for Match Events. Business Rules:
- total_players minimum 4, must be multiple of 4
- total_players must match courts (2 courts = 8 players, 3 courts = 12 players)
- If total_courts > 2, only admin can create
- Only creator can update/delete their own events
